languages.text: Экзальта-117 можно убедить в существовании хроноаномалии и заручиться его поддержкой на совете.

traits.locale_text: Экзальта-117 можно убедить в существовании хроноаномалии и заручиться его поддержкой на совете.

languages.text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.
languages.original_text: Экзальта-117 можно убедить в существовании хроноаномалии и заручиться его поддержкой на совете.

traits.locale_text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support for the council secured.
Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support for the council secured.
Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.
Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.

languages.text: Exalt-117 kann von der Existenz der Chrono-Anomalie überzeugt werden, wodurch seine Unterstützung im Rat gesichert ist.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.

traits.locale_text: Exalt-117 kann von der Existenz der Chrono-Anomalie überzeugt werden, wodurch seine Unterstützung im Rat gesichert ist.

languages.text: Il est possible de convaincre Exalt-117 de l'existence de l'anomalie chronologique et de s'assurer son soutien au sein du conseil.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.

traits.locale_text: Il est possible de convaincre Exalt-117 de l'existence de l'anomalie chronologique et de s'assurer son soutien au sein du conseil.

languages.text: 尊使-117可被说服，让其相信时间异常的存在，同时争取到他在军事议会中的支持。
languages.original_text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.

traits.locale_text: 尊使-117可被说服，让其相信时间异常的存在，同时争取到他在军事议会中的支持。

languages.text: Existe la posibilidad de convencer a Exaltado-117 de la existencia de la anomalía temporal, y con ello procurarse su apoyo en el consejo.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.

traits.locale_text: Existe la posibilidad de convencer a Exaltado-117 de la existencia de la anomalía temporal, y con ello procurarse su apoyo en el consejo.

languages.text: Exalt-117は、起こっていることの非現実性を説得し、評議会での彼の支持を得ることができる。
languages.original_text: Exalt-117 can be persuaded of the unreality of what is happening and get his support on the council.

languages.text: Yüce-117, krono anomalinin varlığına ikna edilebilir ve konseydeki desteği güvence altına alınabilir.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.

traits.locale_text: Yüce-117, krono anomalinin varlığına ikna edilebilir ve konseydeki desteği güvence altına alınabilir.
